title: cyrtomium falcatum var. devexiscapulae
intro: Cyrtomium falcatum var. devexiscapulae, also known as the Chinese fern or umbrella fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The plant is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, and is also believed to have anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Cyrtomium falcatum var. devexiscapulae include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
